# Crimson Rite Acolyte

## Tier 2 Minion

A ritual conduit who sustains the cult through blood rites, shared suffering, and unwavering devotion.

**Motives & Tactics:** Sustain allied cultists, exploit targets, preserve the Cult at any cost

> Difficulty: 13 | Thresholds: 1/2 | HP: 1 | Stress 2
> ATK: +1 | Dagger: Melee | 5 phy

## Features

**Minion (7) - Passive:** The Acolyte is defeated when they take any damage. For every 7 damage a PC deals to the Acolyte, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.

**Group Attack - Action:** Spend a Fear to choose a target and spotlight all Crimson Rite Acolyte within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 5 physical damage each. Combine this damage.
